# 🗓️ Full Trip Itinerary — Merit Camping + Kelowna

***

## 🏕️ Merit Camping — Jun 22–24

### Mon Jun 22
- Arrive Merit, set up camp
- Dinner — BBQ  
  - Wood fire  
  - Dad runs the fire

### Tue Jun 23
- Brunch — eggs, breakfast sandwiches / omelette on grill
- Snack — sweet potatoes in foil on charcoal, marshmallows
- Dinner — marinated meats, tongue, veggies on BBQ
- Evening:
  - Chill by the water
  - Picnic mat on the big field
  - Speaker on
  - Trail walk

### Wed Jun 24 AM
- Breakfast at camp — eggs / omelette
- Pack up, clean camp
- 🚗 Drive Merit → Kelowna / West Kelowna ~2 hrs

***

## 🍷 West Kelowna — Wed Jun 24

**Hotel:** DoubleTree by Hilton, West Kelowna

### Afternoon — West Side Wineries
*Clustered around Boucherie / Brown Rd — easy loop*

| # | Winery | Address | Notes |
|---|--------|---------|-------|
| 1 | Mission Hill Family Estate | Mission Hill Rd, West Kelowna | Iconic estate, underground cellar |
| 2 | Quails' Gate | Boucherie Rd, West Kelowna | 160-acre estate, Old Vines Restaurant |
| 3 | Crown & Thieves | 3887C Brown Rd, West Kelowna | Castle-style building, next to Truck '59 Ciderhouse |

### Evening — Wings + Korea World Cup Game 🇰🇷⚽
- **Wings West Kelowna**
- Address: 2484 Main St #1
- $12 wings all day Wednesday
- Fiji Blonde Lager 14oz — $4.75
- Korea vs. South Africa kick-off: **6:00 PM PDT**

***
